heading: Prohibition on use of lowest price technically acceptable source selection process
label: 4232 Prohibition on use of lowest price technically acceptable source selection process

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Department of Defense shall not use a lowest price technically acceptable source selection process for the engineering and manufacturing development contract of a major defense acquisition program.

children.heading: .—Lowest price technically acceptable source selection process
children.label: 1 .—Lowest price technically acceptable source selection process
children.text: The term “lowest price technically acceptable source selection process” has the meaning given that term in part 15 of the Federal Acquisition Regulation.

children.heading: .—Engineering and manufacturing development contract
children.label: 2 .—Engineering and manufacturing development contract
children.text: The term “engineering and manufacturing development contract” means a prime contract for the engineering and manufacturing development of a major defense acquisition program.
